summary: Phase 50 Testing Complete - Account Manager Module + Invoice Fix + Email CTA + Shiprocket. All 30 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for Account Managers page and Brand Financials (admin + brand portal).
seed_data_creation: Test invoices, credit notes, debit notes, and payments created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 50 features fully tested: (1) Q3 Invoice fix - UUID-based download works, order_number with slashes cannot work due to path separator issue but UUID is the correct approach; (2) Q4 Email CTA - 'Download Tax Invoice' link present in email template using order.id; (3) Q5 Ashish CC - ashish.katiyar@locofast.com in ORDER_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS and ORDER_DELIVERY_CC; (4) Q6 Shiprocket - asyncio.create_task wired for brand orders; (5) Q1+Q2 Account Manager module - all CRUD endpoints working, permission gating verified, unified financials working on both admin and brand portal.

Q3_invoice_fix.details: GET /api/orders/{order.id}/invoice returns 200 + application/pdf. Frontend uses order.id (UUID) instead of order_number.

Q4_email_cta.details: Email template includes 'Download Tax Invoice (GST)' button linking to /api/orders/{order.id}/invoice

details.admin_endpoints: PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/account-manager, PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/managed-brands (max 3 enforced), GET /api/admin/account-managers, GET /api/admin/users, GET /api/admin/brands/{id}/account-manager
details.permission_gating: AM without brand assignment gets 403 on financial endpoints
details.invoices_crud: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE with manual invoice_number, duplicate rejection
details.payments_with_allocation: POST with allocations array, validates sum <= payment amount, updates invoice.amount_paid + status
details.unified_financials_brand: GET /api/brand/financials returns summary + timeline + account_manager card

ui_verification.admin_account_managers_page: Working - shows AMs with brand assignments, capacity remaining, manage/remove buttons
ui_verification.admin_brand_financials_page: Working - shows summary cards (invoiced, paid, CN, DN, outstanding), tabs for invoices/CN/DN/payments/timeline
ui_verification.brand_portal_financials_tab: Working - shows account manager card, summary, invoices table, recent activity
